snippet: A volunteer school worker is a person who voluntarily engages in school work, without payment or reward. School work means: This is a broad definition and means that volunteers who participate in school activities, such as fundraising and assisting with excursions, are well protected from legal action by others. A volunteer student worker is a person who voluntarily engages in approved community work, without payment or reward. Approved community work means work approved by the principal of the school by a student of the school.
